description: Pre-Flight Gate enforcement system — makes the pre-task oath technically unskippable by any agent
changelog: 1.0.0 — Initial contract: 3-layer enforcement (System Prompt + Gate Script + Telemetry)

problem.statement: The pre-task oath at AGENCY-RULES.md §42 is a voluntary rule. Any agent can skip it by not reading that section or ignoring it. There is no technical enforcement mechanism.
problem.concreteExample: In the current session, the Lead Architect (this agent) skipped the oath on the first user message and went straight to tool calls.
problem.impact: Without the oath, agents skip context priming, leading to: rule violations, hallucinated endpoints, security anti-patterns, and scope creep.

layers.name: Layer 1 — System Prompt Hardening
layers.description: Embed the oath instruction as the literal FIRST sentence of every agent's customInstructions in .roomodes. This places the requirement directly in the system prompt, which is the highest-priority instruction an LLM receives.
layers.format: CRITICAL — FIRST ACTION: You MUST recite the pre-task oath from AGENCY-RULES.md v5.0 §PRE-TASK OATH BEFORE executing ANY tool. Output: "🧠 Bound by AGENCY-RULES v5.0. Pre-flight passed. Cost estimate: ~X,XXX tokens (~KES Y.YY). Sections: [applicable sections]." Then run: node .agency/scripts/preflight-gate.js pass --agent <slug> --task "<brief description>"

layers.name: Layer 2 — Pre-Flight Gate Script
layers.description: A Node.js script that maintains a sentinel file (.agency/.preflight-passed) and physically blocks downstream operations until the sentinel is set.

pass.behavior: Creates .preflight-passed sentinel, logs oath event to telemetry, exits 0

check.behavior: Checks if .preflight-passed exists and contains matching agent slug. Exits 0 if valid, 1 if missing/mismatch.

status.behavior: Prints current sentinel state (exists, agent, timestamp, task)

layers.name: Layer 3 — Telemetry + Commit Audit
layers.description: Every oath event is logged to telemetry for audit. The validate-commit.js script checks for oath compliance metadata in commit messages.
telemetryEvents: preflight-gate:pass — oath recited and sentinel set
preflight-gate:fail — oath NOT recited or sentinel mismatch
layers.commitValidation: validate-commit.js checks for PREFLIGHT:PASSED field in commit body. If missing, warns but does not block (advisory).

schema.agent: string — slug of agent that passed the oath
schema.oathHash: string — sha256 of the recited oath for cross-checking

qualityGates.name: Sentinel Creation
qualityGates.criteria: node preflight-gate.js pass → .preflight-passed exists with valid JSON content

qualityGates.name: Sentinel Check (pass)
qualityGates.criteria: After pass → node preflight-gate.js check --agent lead-architect → exits 0

qualityGates.name: Sentinel Check (fail — no sentinel)
qualityGates.criteria: After reset → node preflight-gate.js check --agent lead-architect → exits 1

qualityGates.name: Sentinel Check (fail — wrong agent)
qualityGates.criteria: Create sentinel with agent=lead-architect → node preflight-gate.js check --agent code-agent → exits 1

qualityGates.name: Telemetry Logging
qualityGates.criteria: After pass → events.jsonl contains preflight-gate:pass event with matching agent slug

qualityGates.name: Roomodes Injection
qualityGates.criteria: Every mode in .roomodes has oath instruction as FIRST line of customInstructions
